_README: CALIBRATION FIXTURE - deliberately broken. This is NOT the real ledger. It seeds one fabricated-missing-gate violation so `check.js --calibrate` can prove the checker still fires. The first class claims status=guarded while pointing at a gate file that does not exist in the tree; the checker MUST catch it (guarded-gate-missing). If a future refactor makes the checker blind to this, --calibrate exits 1. See tools/swallow-gate/check.js for the same earn-your-zero contract.

taxonomy.description: A class that claims live protection from a gate that was never written. This is the exact disease history-regression exists to catch: a false 'we cover this'.
A control: a genuinely guarded class pointing at a file that really exists, so the fixture proves the checker does not merely flag everything.
